title: Cuneiform Tablet #0093: Neo-Babylonian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
